items.title: Einhell 2270145 TE-MD 80 Digitális detektor
items.desc: Faldetektor Einhell 2270145 TE-MD 80 Digitális detektor:The Einhell TE-MD 80 digital cable detector is suitable for both DIYers and professional craftsmen who carry out interior or exterior construction work. The instru…
items.raw_desc: Faldetektor Einhell 2270145 TE-MD 80 Digitális detektor:The Einhell TE-MD 80 digital cable detector is suitable for both DIYers and professional craftsmen who carry out interior or exterior construction work. The instrument can reliably check whether there are ferrous or non-ferrous metals, wood or live wires in walls, ceilings or floors. The detection results are indicated by an acoustic signal together with an LCD display and a light indicator. If the light ring around the centering hole is green, there is no obstruction in the wall and the location can be marked as safe through the marking hole. In the case of orange, the detector approaches the object in the wall, while red indicates that the centering hole is directly above the detected object, for example a metal profile.
